title: Final Exam Conflict
content:
I know that some of you have a conflict on our final exam date of Dec 9 at 7:30AM. If it's your case, please email me back with a picture that shows your schedule of classes for this semester (helps me verify that you have a conflict). Also please let me know if you prefer to take the test later that day, or the following day.

 

Thanks
